For hearing of CMA No. 21189/17. (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. ---------- 31.01.2023. Mr. Ajeet Sunder, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Qazi Ayazuddin Qureshi, Assistant Attorney General __________ Learned Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed with pending applications.
